payload.title: Per-tenant/per-project topic routing + subscribe-time isolation
payload.description: Replace the in-process ?workspace= filter (server.js ~L465) with bus subscription to tenant.project topics derived from the authenticated principal (SCP-122). Guarantee a node never receives or forwards another tenant's events. Seed the SSE hello frame with the subscriber's current cursor. Depends on SCP-122 + the bus abstraction. (From SCP-125.)
